problem_text_cn:
## 二、(14分)
如图所示，两个竖直柱形气缸内分别存有摩尔定容热容量各为
$ C_{V_{m1}}=\alpha _{1}R $，$ C_{V_{m2}}=\alpha _{2}R $ 常量的理想气体，中间绝热细管阀门$K$关闭，缸内气体温度和体积各为$ T_{1} $，$ T_{2} $和$ V_{1} $，$ V_{2} $，两缸上方均有轻质可动活塞，活塞与缸壁间摩擦可略，外界压强$p_{0}$为常量.
设系统与外界绝热，将阀门$K$缓慢打开，缸内气体混合后将达到平衡状态，气体总体积增加量记为$\Delta V$.
(1) 设$ \alpha _{1}=\alpha _{2} $，试求$\Delta V$；
(2) 设$ \alpha _{1}\neq \alpha _{2} $，试求$\Delta V$.
problem_text_en:
## Two. (14 points)
As shown in the figure, two vertical cylindrical chambers contain ideal gases with molar heat capacities at constant volume $ C_{V_{m1}}=\alpha _{1}R $ and $ C_{V_{m2}}=\alpha _{2}R $, respectively. A valve $K$ on the adiabatic thin pipe connecting them is closed. The temperatures and volumes of the gases are $ T_{1} $, $ T_{2} $ and $ V_{1} $, $ V_{2} $, respectively. Each chamber has a light movable piston; friction between pistons and walls is negligible. The external pressure $p_{0}$ is constant.
Assume the system is adiabatic with the surroundings. The valve $K$ is slowly opened, and after mixing the gases reach equilibrium. Let the total increase in gas volume be $\Delta V$.
(1) If $ \alpha _{1}=\alpha _{2} $, find $\Delta V$.
(2) If $ \alpha _{1}\neq \alpha _{2} $, find $\Delta V$.
problem_solution_cn:
## 二、(14分)
将两种气体摩尔数分别记为$ \nu_{1} $，$ \nu_{2} $，混合平衡后温度记为$T$，则可列出下述方程组：
$$ W=p_{0}\Delta V, \qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad(1) $$
$$ \Delta U=\nu_{1}\alpha_{1}R(T-T_{1})+\nu_{2}\alpha_{2}R(T-T_{2}), \qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad(2) $$
$$ p_{0}V_{1}=\nu_{1}RT_{1}, \qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad(3) $$
$$ p_{0}V_{2}=\nu_{2}RT_{2}, \qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad(4) $$
$$ p_{0}(V_{1}+V_{2}+\Delta V)=(\nu_{1}+\nu_{2})RT, \qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad(5) $$
$$ W+\Delta U=0, \qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad(6) $$
(1) 引入$ \alpha_{1}=\alpha_{2}=\alpha $，代入(6)式，由(1)、(3)、(4)、(5)式得
$$ W=R\left[(\nu_{1}+\nu_{2})T-(\nu_{1}T_{1}+\nu_{2}T_{2})\right], $$
与(2)式联立，得
$$ W=\frac{1}{\alpha}\Delta U, $$
与(6)式联立，得
$$ W=0, $$
与(1)式联立，即得
$$ \Delta V=0. \qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad(7) $$
(2) $ \alpha_{1}\neq \alpha_{2} $时，由(3)、(4)式得
$$ \nu_{1}=p_{0}V_{1}/RT_{1},\quad \nu_{2}=p_{0}V_{2}/RT_{2}, \qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad(8) $$
代入(5)式，得
$$ p_{0}(V_{1}+V_{2}+\Delta V)=\left(\frac{p_{0}V_{1}}{RT_{1}}+\frac{p_{0}V_{2}}{RT_{2}}\right)RT =\left(\frac{V_{1}}{T_{1}}+\frac{V_{2}}{T_{2}}\right)p_{0}T, $$
$$ \Rightarrow\quad V_{1}+V_{2}+\Delta V=\left(\frac{V_{1}}{T_{1}}+\frac{V_{2}}{T_{2}}\right)T. \qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad(9) $$
将(8)式代入(2)式，得
$$ \Delta U=\alpha_{1}\frac{p_{0}V_{1}}{T_{1}}(T-T_{1})+\alpha_{2}\frac{p_{0}V_{2}}{T_{2}}(T-T_{2}) $$
$$ =\alpha_{1}p_{0}\frac{V_{1}}{T_{1}}T+\alpha_{2}p_{0}\frac{V_{2}}{T_{2}}T -\alpha_{1}p_{0}V_{1}-\alpha_{2}p_{0}V_{2}. $$
将(9)式代入，得
$$ \Delta U=\alpha_{1}p_{0}(V_{1}+V_{2}+\Delta V)+(\alpha_{2}-\alpha_{1})\frac{p_{0}V_{2}}{T_{2}}T -\alpha_{1}p_{0}V_{1}-\alpha_{2}p_{0}V_{2}. $$
将其与(1)、(6)式联立，得
$$ -p_{0}\Delta V = \Delta U = \alpha_{1}p_{0}(V_{1}+V_{2}+\Delta V)+(\alpha_{2}-\alpha_{1})\frac{p_{0}V_{2}}{T_{2}}T -\alpha_{1}p_{0}V_{1}-\alpha_{2}p_{0}V_{2}, $$
化简后可得
$$ \Delta V = (\alpha_{2}-\alpha_{1})(T_{2}-T_{1})V_{1}V_{2}\big/\big[(1+\alpha_{1})T_{1}V_{1}+(1+\alpha_{2})T_{2}V_{2}\big]. \qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad(10) $$
problem_solution_en:
## Two. (14 points)
Let the mole numbers of the two gases be $ \nu_{1} $, $ \nu_{2} $, and the temperature after mixing equilibrium be $T$. The following system of equations can be written:
$$ W=p_{0}\Delta V, \qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad(1) $$
$$ \Delta U=\nu_{1}\alpha_{1}R(T-T_{1})+\nu_{2}\alpha_{2}R(T-T_{2}), \qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad(2) $$
$$ p_{0}V_{1}=\nu_{1}RT_{1}, \qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad(3) $$
$$ p_{0}V_{2}=\nu_{2}RT_{2}, \qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad(4) $$
$$ p_{0}(V_{1}+V_{2}+\Delta V)=(\nu_{1}+\nu_{2})RT, \qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad(5) $$
$$ W+\Delta U=0, \qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad(6) $$
(1) Let $ \alpha_{1}=\alpha_{2}=\alpha $. Substituting into (6), from (1), (3), (4), (5) we obtain
$$ W=R\left[(\nu_{1}+\nu_{2})T-(\nu_{1}T_{1}+\nu_{2}T_{2})\right], $$
Combined with (2) gives
$$ W=\frac{1}{\alpha}\Delta U, $$
and with (6) yields
$$ W=0, $$
hence from (1)
$$ \Delta V=0. \qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad(7) $$
(2) When $ \alpha_{1}\neq \alpha_{2} $, from (3) and (4) we have
$$ \nu_{1}=p_{0}V_{1}/RT_{1},\quad \nu_{2}=p_{0}V_{2}/RT_{2}, \qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad(8) $$
Substituting into (5) gives
$$ p_{0}(V_{1}+V_{2}+\Delta V)=\left(\frac{p_{0}V_{1}}{RT_{1}}+\frac{p_{0}V_{2}}{RT_{2}}\right)RT =\left(\frac{V_{1}}{T_{1}}+\frac{V_{2}}{T_{2}}\right)p_{0}T, $$
$$ \Rightarrow\quad V_{1}+V_{2}+\Delta V=\left(\frac{V_{1}}{T_{1}}+\frac{V_{2}}{T_{2}}\right)T. \qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad(9) $$
Substituting (8) into (2) gives
$$ \Delta U=\alpha_{1}\frac{p_{0}V_{1}}{T_{1}}(T-T_{1})+\alpha_{2}\frac{p_{0}V_{2}}{T_{2}}(T-T_{2}) $$
$$ =\alpha_{1}p_{0}\frac{V_{1}}{T_{1}}T+\alpha_{2}p_{0}\frac{V_{2}}{T_{2}}T -\alpha_{1}p_{0}V_{1}-\alpha_{2}p_{0}V_{2}. $$
Using (9) we obtain
$$ \Delta U=\alpha_{1}p_{0}(V_{1}+V_{2}+\Delta V)+(\alpha_{2}-\alpha_{1})\frac{p_{0}V_{2}}{T_{2}}T -\alpha_{1}p_{0}V_{1}-\alpha_{2}p_{0}V_{2}. $$
Combining with (1) and (6) gives
$$ -p_{0}\Delta V = \Delta U = \alpha_{1}p_{0}(V_{1}+V_{2}+\Delta V)+(\alpha_{2}-\alpha_{1})\frac{p_{0}V_{2}}{T_{2}}T -\alpha_{1}p_{0}V_{1}-\alpha_{2}p_{0}V_{2}, $$
which simplifies to
$$ \Delta V = (\alpha_{2}-\alpha_{1})(T_{2}-T_{1})V_{1}V_{2}\big/\big[(1+\alpha_{1})T_{1}V_{1}+(1+\alpha_{2})T_{2}V_{2}\big]. \qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad(10) $$
img_cn: 图片展示了一道物理题。题目的文字部分说明有两个竖直柱形气缸，中间由绝热细管阀门K关闭。气缸内有不同摩尔定容热容量的理想气体，上方有活塞，外界压强p₀为常量。系统与外界绝热，阀门K缓慢打开后气体混合达到平衡，气体总体积增加量记为ΔV，要求分别计算α₁ = α₂和α₁ ≠ α₂时的ΔV。图片下方有一个简单示意图，画出了两个竖直柱形气缸，气缸上方有活塞，中间有绝热细管阀门K。

图片展示了两种气体混合平衡相关的热力学公式推导过程。包括质量守恒、能量守恒等方程的列写，分α = α₁ = α₂和α₁ ≠ α₂两种情况推导。

 图片包含多种数学公式和符号，公式中涉及两种气体的摩尔数、混合平衡温度、焓变等物理量，还有对α取值的分类讨论及相关推导过程。
img_en: The image displays a physics problem. The text describes two vertical cylindrical chambers separated by an adiabatic thin‑pipe valve K. The chambers contain ideal gases with different molar heat capacities at constant volume, each topped by a movable piston; the external pressure p₀ is constant. The system is adiabatic with the surroundings. After the valve K is slowly opened, the gases mix and reach equilibrium. The total increase in gas volume is denoted ΔV. The problem asks to calculate ΔV for the cases α₁ = α₂ and α₁ ≠ α₂, respectively. Below the text, a simple schematic shows two vertical cylinders, each with a piston, connected by an adiabatic thin pipe with valve K.

The image presents the derivation process for the thermodynamics formulas related to the mixing equilibrium of two gases. It includes writing conservation equations such as mass and energy conservation. The derivation is carried out for two cases: α = α₁ = α₂ and α₁ ≠ α₂.

The image contains various mathematical formulas and symbols, involving physical quantities like the mole numbers of the two gases, the equilibrium temperature after mixing, enthalpy change, etc., as well as classification discussion on the value of α and the relevant derivation steps.
